title: Genetica Flora
description: Adds the crossbreeding of flowers and other plants to the game.
body:
# Genetica Flora
This mods adds the ability to crossbreed plants through a block called _Mutagenic Soil_

Mutagenic Soil is a craftable block, and when there are plants growing above and around it, they will randomly attempt to crossbreed into a new flower.

This crossbreeding can be as simple as creating tulips that are blue, or crossbreeding a chrous flower with a rose bush to create a whole new type of plant.

**Notice: This mod is still in development, so many features have the potential to be changed**

## Future Plans
I plan on allowing crossbreeding crops and saplings in the future, which will be more advanced than the flowers, as they will have different stats you can crossbreed to change, and different attributes.
